jobs.prompt: Market open. Run your opening scan and post results to your Discord channel.
Market closed. Summarize the day's activity, update your state to MEMORY.md, then go idle.
Scheduled health check. Run your probe, assess health, post to your Discord channel if anything changed. Message the orchestrator if you find issues needing a decision.
Scheduled market scan. Check open positions for P&L changes, scan for new opportunities, post to your Discord channel. Message orchestrator for trade recommendations needing approval.

[HEARTBEAT] Hourly check. Read ~/.openfleet/agents/cairn/HEARTBEAT.md for checklist. Quick: agent health (openfleet lifecycle status), active tasks, Discord messages. Post to Discord only if something material changed.
